rules.label: NOR - Criteria for firing a mail before 7 days

rules.name: myRule_8
rules.label: CHL - Criteria to fire a task or a mail

Flow.description: This process will fire an email alert to the opportunity owner 'N' days before close date of the opportunity
Flow.label: ALDCRM Opportunity Owner Intimation Before 'N' Days
